IN1.observed: test_validate_rejects_invalid_authority_documents and test_validate_graph_schema_and_main PASSED (the dev-graph schema/C11 gate accepts confirmed spec/architecture with lineage and rejects invalid authority docs). The R3 import evidence gates are pinned by two deterministic scripts wired into the SKILL goal-seek verification block: validate-evidence-refs.py (evidence_ref existence, exit 2 on registered dangling) and validate-source-digest.py (per-path source_digest equality, exit 2 on reuse) — both cover 5 unit cases each in tests/test_validate_evidence_refs.py / tests/test_validate_source_digest.py. In the OUT1 live trial r10 both gates executed with EXIT:0 (registered_dangling=[], registered_mismatch=[]) and the system-spec-harness coverage/source-citation gate landed at exit0 through the harness 4 entry points to evaluator PASS.
